backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Task, TeamMember, and UserProfile types with CRUD operations for tasks and team members, enforcing access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins. Tasks require a mandatory conference field and are sorted by deadline and priority.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (light mode text visibility fixes and dark mode teal accent color scheme) to their affected frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key changes such as mandatory conference fields, updated TaskStatus enums, and revised team member lists.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for both light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and other semantic UI variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Team Task Manager' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with six routes (Dashboard, MyTasks, Projects, Schedule, Activities, Settings) wrapped in QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider (light default), and AppLayout.
frontend/src/components/AddTaskModal.tsx: Modal dialog for creating a new task with required Conference and Title fields, optional assignee and due date, validation on blur/submit, and integration with the useCreateTask mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AddTeamMemberMod: Simple modal dialog for adding a new team member by name, using the useAddTeamMember mutation hook with toast notifications for success and failure.
frontend/src/components/AddUserModal.tsx: A modal dialog component for adding a new team member by name, using the `useAddTeamMember` mutation hook and displaying success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Root layout component that arranges the app into a three-column structure: left sidebar, main content area, and right panel.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Left navigation sidebar with links to all main routes, a search input, theme toggle, and logout functionality using Internet Identity.
Modal form for creating a new task with fields for conference, title, description, priority, deadline, time range, and assignee, submitting via the `useCreateTask` mutation.
frontend/src/components/EditTaskModal.ts: Modal form pre-populated with an existing task's data, allowing users to edit all task fields and save changes via the `useUpdateTask` mutation.
frontend/src/components/GoogleSignInButt: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/InlineTaskForm.t: A collapsible inline form (visible only to admins) for creating tasks directly on the page without opening a modal, using the same fields as CreateTaskModal.
frontend/src/components/KanbanBoard.tsx: Renders a three-column Kanban board (To Do, In Progress, Done) by filtering tasks by status and displaying them as TaskCard components.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
A modal dialog that lists team members with their active/unclaimed status and allows removing members via a confirmation alert dialog.
frontend/src/components/MiniCalendar.tsx: A static mini calendar component displaying a hardcoded week (Mon–Fri, Aug 4–8, 2024) with the 7th highlighted as the current day.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: A bell icon button that shows a dropdown with task reminders categorized as overdue, due within 1 hour, or due within 24 hours, with a badge count.
A card component for displaying an ongoing task with title, description, tags, member avatars, optional progress bar, and a details button; supports a gradient style variant.
frontend/src/components/PersistentTaskFo: A persistent form for creating new tasks with fields for conference, title, description, priority, deadline, time range, and assignee, submitting via the createTask mutation.
frontend/src/components/PriorityBadge.ts: A small badge component that renders a color-coded pill label (red/amber/green) based on a task's High, Medium, or Low priority.
frontend/src/components/ProjectRow.tsx: A table row component displaying a project's icon, name, status badge, budget, deadline, and up to 4 member avatars with an overflow count.
frontend/src/components/ReportExportButt: A set of export buttons allowing CSV download of tasks for this week, this month, or a custom date range selected via a popover.
frontend/src/components/RightPanel.tsx: Renders a right sidebar panel containing internal team avatars, a mini calendar, tasks checklist, team members list, and a footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/StatsCard.tsx: A reusable card component that displays a stat with an icon, numeric value, and label, styled with optional icon background color.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadgeDropd: A dropdown badge component for displaying and changing a task's status (ToDo, InProgress, Done) with color-coded styling.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Displays a single task card with title, description, priority badge, assignees, deadline, and either a status dropdown or a static status badge.
frontend/src/components/TaskFilters.tsx: Provides search and assignee filter controls for task lists, falling back to a predefined member list if no members are loaded.
frontend/src/components/TasksChecklist.t: Renders a static checklist of three hardcoded tasks with a progress bar showing completion percentage.
frontend/src/components/TaskStatusContro: A select-based control for updating a task's status via a mutation hook, with loading indicator and color-coded styles per status.
frontend/src/components/TeamMemberCard.t: Displays a team member's avatar, name, claim status, and task counts (done/pending/total), with an optional expandable task list and remove button.
Renders a static list of four hardcoded team members with avatar initials, name, email, and a hover-reveal mail icon.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSwitcher.ts: A toggle button that switches between light and dark themes using the useTheme hook, with animated sun/moon icons and a tooltip.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on tasks and team members, wrapping backend actor calls with caching and invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskFilters.ts: Custom hook that memoizes filtering of a task list by search string and assignee name.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskReminders.ts: Custom hook that categorizes tasks into overdue, due within one hour, and due within 24 hours buckets using memoization.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom hook that manages dark/light theme state, persists the preference to localStorage, and applies CSS classes to the document root.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes (colors, sidebar, charts) and applying Tailwind base/component/utility layers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Activities.tsx: Activities page displaying a filterable, date-grouped activity log with static mock data and type-specific icons and badge styles.
frontend/src/pages/ActivityLog.tsx: Placeholder ActivityLog page component that renders an empty-state message when no activity has been recorded.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Empty or stub AdminDashboard page file with no content provided.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying task stats (total, in-progress, completed, overdue), ongoing task cards, and a project list table, with a create task modal and search functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ForgotPassword.tsx: Empty file with no content or implementation.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page that renders a centered card with an Internet Identity sign-in button using the useInternetIdentity hook.
frontend/src/pages/MyTasks.tsx: Personal task list page with mock data, supporting filter tabs (all/todo/inprogress/done) and search, rendering tasks with status icons, priority badges, and tags.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: Onboarding page that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name, then reloads the app to re-trigger the auth flow.
frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx: Projects page displaying a static list of projects in grid or list view, with search and status filtering, progress bars, and member avatars.
frontend/src/pages/Schedule.tsx: Calendar schedule page showing a navigable monthly calendar grid with hardcoded events and an upcoming events sidebar panel.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page with sidebar navigation for Profile, Notifications, Appearance, and Security sections, supporting theme toggling and editable profile fields.
frontend/src/pages/Signup.tsx: Empty signup page file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/Tasks.tsx: Tasks page supporting Kanban and list view modes with search/status filtering, task creation modal, status updates, and CSV report export buttons.
frontend/src/pages/TeamMembers.tsx: Team members management page displaying member stats, a searchable grid of member cards, and an add-member modal with remove support.
frontend/src/pages/TeamMemberView.tsx: Personal task dashboard allowing users to claim a team member profile via Internet Identity and view/update their assigned tasks with status stats.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility functions to export tasks as CSV files filtered by this week, this month, or a custom date range.
frontend/src/utils/icErrors.ts: Empty utility file for Internet Computer error handling with no content.
frontend/src/utils/reminderLogic.ts: Utility functions to determine if a task is overdue, due soon, or due within 24 hours, and to generate human-readable reminder messages.
frontend/src/utils/taskSorting.ts: Utility that sorts tasks by deadline (ascending) then by priority, placing tasks without deadlines at the end.
frontend/src/utils/taskUrgency.ts: Utility that classifies tasks into urgency levels (overdue, urgent, soon, normal, completed) and returns corresponding Tailwind color and background classes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography, border radius, box shadows, and accordion animations for the frontend.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for TaskFlow dashboard tracking two active fix features: resolving light mode text visibility and updating dark mode accent colors to teal.
